description: 🎀 Make every day an adventure with Gabby’s Dollhouse Backpack! This charming 31cm arch-style bag features Gabby and her adorable friends, adding a touch of fun to school days. Crafted from durable materials, it stands up to the rigors of daily use, while the adjustable straps ensure a comfortable fit. With a spacious main pocket and a handy side mesh pocket, it’s perfect for carrying books, snacks, and more. Elevate your child’s back-to-school experience with this enchanting and practical backpack! 🎀
